goal: pre.carrier = ker.carrier and forall(x0: M) { pre.contains(x0) = ker.contains(x0) }
proof: let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ ker != w0 ∈ pre }

goal: linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, M, N](src, zero_submodule[R, N](dst), f) = linear_map_kernel_submodule[R, M, N](src, dst, f)
pre.carrier = full.carrier and forall(x0: M) { pre.contains(x0) = full.contains(x0) }
proof: let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ full != w0 ∈ pre }

goal: linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, M, N](src, full_submodule[R, N](dst), f) = full_submodule[R, M](src)
